title: The King of Oudh's Estate Validation Act, 1917
full_text: The King of Oudh's Estate Validation Act, 1917 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 191712 Act Number: 12 Enactment Date: 1917-03-21 Act Year: 1917 Short Title: The King of Oudh's Estate Validation Act, 1917 Long Title: An Act to validate certain deeds of conveyance and a trust deed relating to certain properties of His late Majesty, Wajid Ali Shah, King of Oudh, and for other purposes. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 21-03-1917 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The King of Oudh's Estate Validation Act, 1917 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Validation of certain deeds. Section 3. Payment of Rs. 77,856 from the Fund. Section 4. Distribution. Schedule 1.
